articles.author: Seattle Times staff
articles.title: Live: Seattle World Cup updates: Fans take over city before USA faces Australia - The Seattle Times
articles.description: With the U.S. facing Australia, the World Cup spotlight returns to Seattle on Friday bigger and brighter than ever. Keep up with activity across the city here.
articles.content:
With the U.S. men’s national team facing off against Australia, the World Cup spotlight returns to Seattle on Friday bigger and brighter than ever.
And there should be no shortage of activity across… [+1208 chars]
